name: immich-kiosk
tagline: A read-only Immich front end for kiosks and shared displays
description: Immich Kiosk is a simplified read only front end for Immich designed for kiosks and shared displays. It focuses on browsing and viewing photos with minimal controls, using Immich as the backend media source.

features.title: Photo Slideshow
features.description: Display photos in a continuous slideshow view

features.title: Immich Integration
features.description: Load photos from an existing Immich instance

features.title: Full-Screen Display
features.description: Run slideshows in a kiosk-style full-screen mode

features.title: Minimal Configuration
features.description: Configure slideshow behavior with simple settings

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the kiosk display on your own infrastructure
